notes: Contracts are the primary lane; shared/admin only verify and recover failed wiring.

Current code evidence: GardensModule has no yieldResolver wiring; YieldResolver still keeps setGardenHypercertPool owner-only; garden treasury fallback remains incomplete.
Do not implement without an explicit migration/backfill checklist.
Delivery target: complete by 2026-05-15, with contracts landing first and state_api/ui/QA following sequentially.

Strengthened 2026-04-26: typed HypercertSignal pool state, no array-index pool classification, bidirectional resolver verification, reset cleanup, upgrade-script cross-wiring, and lane handoffs are required.

ui.handoff_note: Admin /community owns reconnect UX; compact status elsewhere deep-links to /community. Do not infer Hypercert pool by array index.

state_api.handoff_note: Shared hooks expose typed expected/resolver wiring state; useGardenPools must stop classifying pools by trimmed array index.

contracts.handoff_note: Implement typed HypercertSignal pool mapping, trusted GardensModule caller, stronger manual validation, reset cleanup, migration/backfill, post-deploy checks, and upgrade-script cross-wiring.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Review operator UX for missing/mismatched wiring and verify no retry appears when Hypercert pool identity is unknown.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run contract tests, storage safety, post-deploy dry-run, shared/admin tests, full repo validation, and confirm no unacknowledged no-pool gardens remain.

history.note: Reclassified as a contract-led backlog feature and designated as the prerequisite for yield-split-ui.
Moved feature hub from backlog to active

Reassessed against packages/contracts/src/modules/Gardens.sol and packages/contracts/src/resolvers/Yield.sol. Contracts are the first active lane; state/API and UI remain blocked until contract wiring, fallback, and migration/backfill decisions land.
Set completion target to 2026-05-15 (second week of May) and confirmed the contract-first delivery sequence.
